Package global.thalion.ttio.protection

Class PerAUEncryption

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.protection.PerAUEncryption
public final class PerAUEncryption extends Object
v1.0 per-Access-Unit encryption primitives. Implements opt_per_au_encryption (channel data) and opt_encrypted_au_headers (AU semantic header) as specified in docs/transport-encryption-design.md and docs/format-spec.md §9.1.

Unlike EncryptionManager — which encrypts an entire channel as one AES-GCM operation — this class generates one AES-GCM operation per spectrum, producing PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment rows and optional PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegment rows.

Each AES-GCM op binds its ciphertext to its context via authenticated data: dataset_id (u16 LE) || au_sequence (u32 LE) || purpose_tag, where purpose_tag is the UTF-8 channel name, the literal bytes "header", or the literal bytes "pixel".

Cross-language equivalents: Python ttio.encryption_per_au, Objective-C TTIOPerAUEncryption.

    Description

    static final record 
    PerAUEncryption.GcmResult
    Result of a per-AU encryption: (iv, tag, ciphertext).
    static final record 
    PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegment
    One encrypted row of spectrum_index/au_header_segments.

  • Method Details

    • aadForChannel

      public static byte[] aadForChannel(int datasetId, long auSequence, String channelName)
      AAD for an encrypted channel: dataset_id || au_sequence || channel_name_utf8.

    • aadForHeader

      public static byte[] aadForHeader(int datasetId, long auSequence)
      AAD for the encrypted AU semantic header. Appends literal "header".

    • aadForPixel

      public static byte[] aadForPixel(int datasetId, long auSequence)
      AAD for the encrypted MSImagePixel envelope. Appends literal "pixel".

    • encryptWithAad

      public static PerAUEncryption.GcmResult encryptWithAad(byte[] plaintext, byte[] key, byte[] aad, byte[] iv)
      AES-256-GCM encrypt with AAD. Generates a fresh random IV when iv is null; deterministic tests pass a fixed IV.

    • decryptWithAad

      public static byte[] decryptWithAad(byte[] iv, byte[] tag, byte[] ciphertext, byte[] key, byte[] aad)
      AES-256-GCM decrypt + authenticate. Throws on tag / AAD mismatch.

    • randomIv

      public static byte[] randomIv()
      Generate a 12-byte cryptographically-random IV.

    • encryptChannelToSegments

      public static List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> encryptChannelToSegments(byte[] plaintextFloat64Le, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key)
      Slice flat float64 plaintext into per-spectrum rows and encrypt each with a fresh IV. Equivalent to encryptChannelToSegments(byte[], long[], int[], int, String, byte[], int) with bytesPerElement = 8 (legacy MS path).

    • encryptChannelToSegments

      public static List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> encryptChannelToSegments(byte[] plaintextLe, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key, int bytesPerElement)
      M90.1: slice flat little-endian plaintext into per-AU rows of bytesPerElement bytes per logical element and encrypt each with a fresh IV.

      bytesPerElement mirrors the Python dtype kwarg: pass 8 for the legacy MS float64 channels and 1 for the M90.1 genomic uint8 sequences/qualities channels. The offsets / lengths arrays are in element units (not byte units), exactly as stored in the index groups.

    • decryptChannelFromSegments

      public static byte[] decryptChannelFromSegments(List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> segments, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key)
      Decrypt every row in order and concatenate plaintext float64 bytes. Equivalent to decryptChannelFromSegments(List, int, String, byte[], int) with bytesPerElement = 8 (legacy MS path).

    • decryptChannelFromSegments

      public static byte[] decryptChannelFromSegments(List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> segments, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key, int bytesPerElement)
      M90.1: decrypt every row and concatenate the plaintext bytes, validating the per-row plaintext length against length * bytesPerElement.

      Pass bytesPerElement = 8 for the legacy MS float64 channels and 1 for the M90.1 genomic uint8 sequences/qualities channels.

    • encryptChannelByRegion

      public static List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> encryptChannelByRegion(byte[] plaintextLe, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> chromosomes, int datasetId, String channelName, Map<String,byte[]> keyMap)
      M90.4: per-AU dispatch on chromosome name. Reads on chromosomes in keyMap get encrypted with the corresponding AES-256-GCM key; reads on chromosomes NOT in keyMap emit a "clear segment" — same PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment compound shape, but with empty IV (iv.length == 0), empty tag, and the raw plaintext bytes ride in the ciphertext slot.

      The decoder branches on seg.iv().length: 0 = clear, 12 = AES-GCM. Old M90.1 files (every IV is exactly 12 bytes) still decode unchanged under the same dispatch table. The empty-IV sentinel is unambiguous because AES-GCM IVs are always exactly 12 bytes per FIPS-198.

    • decryptChannelByRegion

      public static byte[] decryptChannelByRegion(List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> segments, List<String> chromosomes, int datasetId, String channelName, Map<String,byte[]> keyMap)
      M90.4: inverse of encryptChannelByRegion(byte[], long[], int[], List, int, String, Map). Branches on seg.iv().length: 0 = clear segment (the ciphertext IS the plaintext), 12 = AES-256-GCM (must have a key for the segment's chromosome in keyMap, else throws).

    • packAUHeaderPlaintext

      public static byte[] packAUHeaderPlaintext(PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext h)
      Pack a semantic header into the canonical 36-byte plaintext.

    • unpackAUHeaderPlaintext

      public static PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext unpackAUHeaderPlaintext(byte[] plain)
      Inverse of packAUHeaderPlaintext(global.thalion.ttio.protection.PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext).

    • encryptHeaderSegments

      public static List<PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegment> encryptHeaderSegments(List<PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext> rows, int datasetId, byte[] key)
      Encrypt one PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext per spectrum into PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegments.

    • decryptHeaderSegments

      public static List<PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext> decryptHeaderSegments(List<PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegment> segments, int datasetId, byte[] key)
      Decrypt and unpack PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegments into PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintexts.
